creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #9)

Hi Niclas,

I'm pretty sure there is no kernel driver for the mga, and pretty sure there's no way i'm using it if it does exist.

I'm not 100% sure how to know for certain but here's my dmesg if that helps:
